title: Automate OAK PR cartography and evidence gates

claims.statement: OAKGate rejects manifest and claim objects that violate their canonical JSON Schema contracts.
falsification_criteria: A manifest containing an unknown top-level property is accepted.

claims.statement: ClaimGraph detects duplicate identifiers, missing dependencies, self-dependencies and dependency cycles.
falsification_criteria: A cyclic claim dependency graph receives a non-blocking verdict.

claims.statement: The Evidence Ledger detects broken predecessor links, modified records and contradictory status versus exit code.
falsification_criteria: A modified ledger record with an unchanged declared hash is accepted.
exclusions: The chain does not attest the integrity of the GitHub runner itself.

claims.statement: Evidence tied to another head, base, dependency lock, test definition or environment cannot support the current claim.
falsification_criteria: Evidence generated for a different head SHA satisfies a required evidence kind.

claims.statement: Policy-as-code raises deterministic blocking findings when protected paths use an insufficient PR class or forbidden capability.
falsification_criteria: A workflow change adding write_repository_contents passes policy evaluation.

self_review.reason: This PR changes OAK kernel, policy and GitHub workflow files.
